providers.name: Delta Air Lines
accessibility_features: support for blind, low-vision, deaf, and hard-of-hearing travelers
accessible service request form for some requests
providers.accommodation_summary: Delta has a broad accessible-travel hub covering mobility devices, sensory/cognitive needs, service animals, medical devices, and vision/hearing assistance.

duration_relevant.powered_mobility: Publishes wheelchair, scooter, and assistive-device guidance; travelers should confirm battery details and device dimensions before booking.
duration_relevant.service_animal_relief: Service animal travel is documented; long trips require advance relief and sanitation planning with airports and Delta.
duration_relevant.medical_equipment_medication: Publishes medical-device and medication guidance, including portable medical equipment considerations.
duration_relevant.seating_rest: Special seating and assistance can be requested; long flights may still require advance confirmation of transfer, aisle-chair, and rest needs.
duration_relevant.duration_notes: Air travel can reduce total trip time, but long flights make battery, transfer, seating, and service-animal planning important.

providers.notes: Recommendation should still be conditional on route availability.

providers.name: United Airlines
providers.accommodation_summary: United provides an accessibility and assistance hub for travelers needing mobility, communication, medical-device, or service-animal support.

duration_relevant.powered_mobility: Accessibility guidance covers mobility assistance; powered-device details should be confirmed for the aircraft and route.
duration_relevant.service_animal_relief: Service-animal travel is documented; long or connecting trips require relief-area planning and direct confirmation.
duration_relevant.medical_equipment_medication: Medical-device and assistive-device information is part of the accessibility workflow.
duration_relevant.seating_rest: Travelers can request assistance and seating support, but aircraft-specific constraints should be verified before booking.
duration_relevant.duration_notes: Good candidate for longer-distance air trips when the user confirms device, seating, and animal-relief details in advance.

providers.notes: Official page is JavaScript-heavy; store URL only, not scraped text.

providers.name: American Airlines
accessibility_features: special assistance request during booking or trip management
providers.accommodation_summary: American documents special assistance for wheelchair users, mobility and medical devices, vision/hearing needs, cognitive or developmental disabilities, and service animals.

duration_relevant.powered_mobility: Publishes mobility and medical-device guidance; powered-wheelchair battery and handling details should be confirmed.
duration_relevant.service_animal_relief: Service animal approval and planning may require advance action; longer flights need relief planning.
duration_relevant.medical_equipment_medication: Includes mobility and medical-device assistance in the special-assistance flow.
duration_relevant.seating_rest: Special seating can be requested for disability-related needs, including service animals, fixed legs, transfer needs, or extra space.
duration_relevant.duration_notes: Air reduces elapsed travel time, but long flights require stronger advance confirmation of seating, service-animal, and device-handling details.

providers.notes: Dataset captures official accommodations only; recent enforcement history should not be treated as a guarantee of service quality.

providers.name: Southwest Airlines
providers.accommodation_summary: Southwest provides customer-with-disabilities guidance for common air-travel assistance needs, including mobility, service animals, and communication support.

duration_relevant.powered_mobility: Travelers should confirm powered mobility-device handling and battery requirements directly with Southwest before booking.
duration_relevant.service_animal_relief: Longer routes or connections require traveler-led planning for service-animal relief areas.
duration_relevant.medical_equipment_medication: Medical and assistive-device needs should be declared and confirmed before travel.
duration_relevant.seating_rest: Boarding and seating-related support may be available, but policies and assigned-seat processes should be checked before booking.
duration_relevant.duration_notes: Best treated as a candidate for shorter or medium air trips unless long-trip accommodation details are confirmed directly.

providers.notes: Official support page is JavaScript-heavy; store URL only, not scraped text.

providers.name: JetBlue
accessibility_features: medical device and assistive-device travel guidance
providers.accommodation_summary: JetBlue has an accessibility-assistance hub for air travelers needing mobility, communication, service-animal, sensory/cognitive, or medical-device support.

duration_relevant.powered_mobility: Travelers should confirm mobility-device dimensions, battery handling, and airport assistance before travel.
duration_relevant.service_animal_relief: Long flights and connections require advance service-animal relief and documentation planning.
duration_relevant.medical_equipment_medication: Medical-device needs should be added to the trip and confirmed before departure.
duration_relevant.seating_rest: Seat and boarding support should be requested early; aircraft-specific constraints still apply.
duration_relevant.duration_notes: Good air candidate when the route exists and the traveler confirms long-duration device, seating, and animal needs.

providers.notes: Official page is JavaScript-heavy; store URL only, not scraped text.

providers.name: Alaska Airlines
providers.accommodation_summary: Alaska Airlines publishes accessible-services information for airport accessibility, mobility support, service animals, and related air-travel accommodations.

duration_relevant.powered_mobility: Powered mobility-device details should be confirmed with Alaska before booking and again before departure.
duration_relevant.service_animal_relief: Service-animal handling should be confirmed in advance; relief-area planning is important for long trips and connections.
duration_relevant.medical_equipment_medication: Medical and assistive-device support should be declared and confirmed before travel.
duration_relevant.seating_rest: Boarding and seating support may be available; confirm aircraft-specific constraints for longer trips.
duration_relevant.duration_notes: Useful air candidate for routes Alaska serves, with direct confirmation required for long-duration mobility and service-animal needs.

providers.notes: Official page is JavaScript-heavy; store URL only, not scraped text.

providers.name: Amtrak
accessibility_features: service animals permitted in passenger areas
providers.accommodation_summary: Amtrak provides detailed accessible-travel information for accessible space, wheelchair seating, service animals, mobility devices, station access, oxygen equipment, and attendants.

duration_relevant.powered_mobility: Publishes wheeled mobility-device specifications and boarding/detraining procedures; confirm device size and station access.
duration_relevant.service_animal_relief: Service animals are permitted in passenger areas; long-distance routes require route-specific relief-stop planning.
duration_relevant.medical_equipment_medication: Publishes oxygen-equipment guidance and related accessible-travel request information.
duration_relevant.seating_rest: Accessible seats, wheelchair spaces, attendants, meal-service considerations, and sleeper options on some routes can make rail stronger for multi-day trips.
duration_relevant.duration_notes: Rail may be preferable for long or multi-day travel when rest, accessible space, equipment access, and service-animal planning matter more than fastest elapsed time.

providers.notes: Station accessibility varies and must be checked for the actual origin and destination.

providers.name: Uber
accessibility_features: wait-time fee waiver or refund process for riders with disabilities
wheelchair accessible vehicle availability in some markets
providers.accommodation_summary: Uber documents platform accessibility, disability support, wait-time fee waivers/refunds, service-animal support, and accessibility feedback channels.

duration_relevant.powered_mobility: Wheelchair-accessible vehicle availability is market-dependent; powered-wheelchair users must verify local availability before relying on Uber.
duration_relevant.service_animal_relief: Service animals are relevant for point-to-point rides; long trips still need driver acceptance and break planning.
duration_relevant.medical_equipment_medication: Best for short local trips where the user can bring equipment into a standard or accessible vehicle.
duration_relevant.seating_rest: Standard rides generally do not provide rest accommodations; trip length and vehicle fit should be considered.
duration_relevant.duration_notes: Best for local or first-mile/last-mile travel, not as the main recommendation for multi-day trips.

providers.notes: Accessibility and wheelchair-accessible vehicle availability vary by market.

providers.name: Lyft
accessibility_features: service animal policy and enforcement handled through Lyft support
providers.accommodation_summary: Lyft provides rider access through its app, publishes accessibility contact/feedback information, and offers mobility-related services that vary by city.

duration_relevant.powered_mobility: Wheelchair-accessible ride availability is city-dependent and should be confirmed before relying on Lyft.
duration_relevant.service_animal_relief: Service animals are relevant for point-to-point trips; riders should be prepared to report refusals through Lyft support.
duration_relevant.medical_equipment_medication: Best for local trips where equipment fits in the selected vehicle type.
duration_relevant.seating_rest: Standard rides generally lack rest accommodations; consider XL or other vehicle types only if they meet the need.
duration_relevant.duration_notes: Best used for local transportation or first-mile/last-mile connections rather than multi-day primary travel.

providers.notes: Use cautiously for mobility-device needs because accessible-vehicle availability is local.
